summary: The current image pool contains useful candidates. Model only accepted or tightly guarded directions, and record both accepted construction tokens and rejected familiar reads before 3D work.

accepted_tokens: aged brass collar and hinge logic
candidates.next_action: Write model from the accepted image and replace chest language in prompts.

review_notes: Too visually redundant with the petal reward reliquary.
Needs stronger hand ergonomics, active end, scale cues, and tool identity before modeling.
candidates.next_action: Regenerate before modeling. Preserve compact clamp/lens idea, but separate silhouette from reward reliquary language.

review_notes: Needs readable attack direction, weak point, idle/active state, and category clarity without color or material detail.
candidates.next_action: Regenerate or heavily guardrail before modeling. Use as hostile trap/relic only if face and limb reads are removed.

camera_distance_silhouette_gate.test: Flat black three-quarter silhouette at 128px height.
camera_distance_silhouette_gate.pass_condition: Gameplay category remains readable without color, material, cracks, bevels, glow, or labels.

required_reads.FE_PROP_COMMON_ExplorationTool_01: player-held tool, not a small reliquary
